channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 kageroumado/phosphene (676 ⭐)
item.description:

]]>

item.title: 📝 victorbrandaao/CloudBoost (18 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: victorbrandaao

📝 Repository: victorbrandaao/CloudBoost

📄 Descrizione: A native, open-source macOS menu bar utility built in Swift to eliminate ping spikes, stuttering, and input lag. Optimizes your system in real-time for GeForce NOW, Boosteroid, and Xbox Cloud Gaming. Perfect for competitive titles where every millisecond matters, like League of Legends, Warzone, or Battlefield 6.

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Swift
